title: Toffy's Biome Paint
description: Paint biomes onto your world! Convert Savannas to Plains or paint the world Crimson Forest
body:
Allows you to change the worlds biomes with a brush! Ideal for changing the tints of grass and the colour of the sky, water and fog! A lot of recipes, JEI recomended.
As of right now, although it's compatible with other mods, there are only recipes for paints of vanilla biomes, Although this can easily be fixed with a data pack. I will add more compatability in later versions, although if you're a dev, you can look at my recipes and add compat in your own projects! 

To use the brush simply hold it in your main hand with a biome paint in your off hand(or vice versa). Biome Paints can be crafting with misc items from a biome and a bottle, E.G. Pink Petals, Cherry Leaves and a Bottle will make the Cherry Grove biome paint, It's recomended to use JEI to view the recipes, although they are easy enough to guess.

![Image shows how to craft the Biome Brush.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca76af105e355274408d7f5540717009450f6306.png) ![The Image shows the before and after of using the biome brush to customise a Biome.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0912342aea28e2567f38ce4e34253adcd4b18162_0.webp)
